classes.reasoning: This document is titled 'SERIOUS ADVERSE EVENT REPORT' with SAE reference number BIORCE-SAE-2023-008, containing pharmacovigilance case narrative, causality assessment, and regulatory filing confirmations for a SUSAR. It is a regulated Trial Master File document that does not fit the more specific categories like CSP, ICF, or CSR.

summary: This is a final serious adverse event report (SAE reference BIORCE-SAE-2023-008) documenting a Grade 3 drug-induced pneumonitis in a 71-year-old female patient enrolled in study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001. The SUSAR report details the clinical course, causality assessment (probably related to BRC-471), and regulatory submissions to EudraVigilance and national competent authorities within required timelines. The event resolved after drug discontinuation and steroid treatment.
